findings: Monitor reads swarm-state.json telemetry and warning flags for no proof/incomplete proof.
child-agents.jsonl telemetry is never read, so per-child visibility is missing.
Commander row always labels full SS-250 even if partial or underscale.
If progress_dir missing, nested display silently skips without warning.
Commander roster uses pane index instead of commander_id.
Metaswarm detection uses collab/ presence but README does not document it.
Commander state file path uses progress_dir in roster but hardcodes BASE/commanders in orphan recovery.
